subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! Render thanks unto God that through the infinite bounties of the Supreme Beauty thou hast been guided [3.5s]... ...The Mashriqu’l-Adhkar is the lodestone of divine confirmations. The Mashriqu’l-Adhkar is the mighty foundation of the Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی شکر کن خدا را که بفیوضات نامتناهیه جمال کبریا هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
